channel.title: Pigsty – Category: FUNC
channel.description: Recent content in Category: FUNC on Pigsty

item.title: Docs: pg_summarize
item.description:
Overview

PIGSTY 3rd Party Extension: pg_summarize : Text Summarization using LLMs. Built using pgrx

Information

  • ID: 1250
  • Name: pg_summarize
  • Alias: pg_summarize
  • Category: FUNC
  • Website: https://github.com/HexaCluster/pg_summarize
  • License: PostgreSQL License
  • Language: Rust
  • Tags: pgrx
  • Comment: 无

Metadata

  • Version: 0.0.0
  • PG Vers: 17,16,15,14,13,12
  • Need Load: Lib Loading NOT Required
  • Need DDL: DO CREATE EXTENSION DDL
  • Relocatable: Relocatable
  • Trusted: Untrusted, Require Superuser to Create
  • Schemas: N/A
  • Requires: N/A

Packages

  • RPM Repo: PIGSTY
  • RPM Name: pg_summarize_$v
  • RPM Ver : 0.0.0
  • RPM Deps: Nil
  • DEB Repo: PIGSTY
  • DEB Name: postgresql-$v-pg-summarize
  • DEB Ver : 0.0.0
  • DEB Deps: Nil

Details
